summary: Worker Infrastructure (Celery) Iteration 75 - All 15 backend tests PASS. 10-part worker infrastructure verified: Worker Pool Design (5 pools), Worker Health, DLQ Consumers, Queue Monitoring with Prometheus, Worker Autoscaling, Failure Handling Simulation (crash/dlq_capture/retry), Observability, Performance Test, Incident Response (worker_crash/redis_disconnect), Infrastructure Score. Frontend Workers tab renders correctly with all 10 sub-tabs.

issues: Initial render shows gray loading state for ~4-6 seconds before content appears - consider showing skeleton/shimmer instead of gray box

critical_code_review_comments: Worker pool design correctly defines 5 pools: booking, voucher, notification, incident, cleanup with proper queue isolation
DLQ configuration covers all 5 main queues plus legacy queues (default, critical, supplier)
Autoscaling rules properly defined for all 5 pools with scale_up/scale_down thresholds
Failure simulation tests (crash, dlq_capture, retry) all return PASS verdict
Performance test injects and drains 100 jobs with verified throughput
Incident tests (worker_crash, redis_disconnect) verify recovery mechanisms
Infrastructure score calculation uses weighted components: redis(20%), celery(25%), mongodb(20%), queue_architecture(15%), monitoring(10%), failure_handling(10%)
Prometheus metrics exported in correct text exposition format with syroce_queue_depth, syroce_dlq_depth metrics
Frontend Workers tab correctly uses useApi hook for lazy loading data
seed_data_creation: None - endpoints return real worker infrastructure data
context_for_next_testing_agent: Worker infrastructure fully implemented and tested. Infrastructure score 9.88/10 exceeds 9.5 target. All 15 API endpoints working. Frontend Workers tab has 10 sub-tabs: Dashboard, Worker Pools, DLQ, Monitoring, Autoscaling, Failure Test, Observability, Perf Test, Incident, Score. In preview environment without real Celery workers, worker status shows 'registered' (not 'healthy') which is expected. Redis broker on DB 1, result backend on DB 2. Cookie-based auth uses withCredentials=true for frontend.

features_verified.Part1_Worker_Pools: PASS - 5 pools (booking, voucher, notification, incident, cleanup) with queue isolation
features_verified.Part2_Worker_Health: PASS - returns status, pools, kombu_bindings, active_pools
features_verified.Part3_DLQ_Consumers: PASS - 8 DLQ queues configured, returns depths and permanent_failures count
features_verified.Part5_Autoscaling: PASS - decisions for 5 pools with action (scale_up/scale_down/hold) and rules
features_verified.Part7_Observability: PASS - worker_processes, cpu_usage, memory_usage, job_rates with success_rate_pct
features_verified.Part8_Performance_Test: PASS - 100 jobs injected and drained, throughput metrics returned
features_verified.Part9a_Worker_Crash_Incident: PASS - 4 test steps passing, recovery_mechanism verified
features_verified.Part9b_Redis_Disconnect_Incident: PASS - 3 test steps passing, reconnection verified
features_verified.Dashboard_Combined: PASS - infrastructure_score, worker_health, pools, queue_metrics, autoscaling
features_verified.Prometheus_Metrics: PASS - text/plain format with syroce_queue_depth metrics

components.celery: 9.5/10 (25% weight) - registered status with all pools active
components.failure_handling: 10/10 (10% weight) - acks_late, retry policies, autoscaling rules
